      New possibilities await you.

    • Possibility Management is a global Gameworld providing:

      3 Phase Healing,

      Authentic Adulthood Initiations,

      Thoughtware Upgrades,

      Transformational Skills, and

      Personal Agency for creating the culture in which you would love to live.

      You can start where you are...

      ...and help build a new future on Earth together.

       

       

      "It is thanks to the gameworld of Possibility Management that we are now creating deep and meaningful sharings."

      - Alan Gerardo Chavez Anzures, Mexico, 2023

    • Prelude

      Once we set ourselves to the task up upgrading human thoughtware on Earth, the doorways opened and avalanches of discoveries poured through us. These are treasures for everyone. We share this invaluable abundance in books, websites, articles, videos, podcasts, S.P.A.R.K.s, and trainings.

      Intelligence is the ability to interact.

      Education researcher Joseph Chilton Pearce, author of classics such as: The Crack In The Cosmic Egg, and The Magical Child, defined 'intelligence' as: 'the ability to interact'.

      This explains why Possibility Management's 'interaction technologies' so often create sudden leaps in intelligence!

      Possibility Management offers highly effective and totally reproducible:

      • HEALING: Evolutionary Healing and personal development Processes for locating old Decisions and Energetic Blocks, to unleash potential and tap into inner and outer Resources that modern culture knows little about.
      • INITIATIONS: Authentic Audulthood Initiatory Processes from Archiarchy, the culture that is naturally emerging around the world now that Matriarchy and Patriarchy have run their course
      • THOUGHTWARE UPGRADES: Radical Responsibility Thoughtware Upgrades powered by Bright Principles that give you new Clarity for using your inner and outer conflicts as a source of insight and Possibility.
      • TRANSFORMATION: Practices for taking back your Center, your Voice, your Attention, your ability to Connect, and your Authority for Creating a Culture that you would love to live in, using Nonmaterial Value as the primary Currency.
      • AGENCY: Personal Agency is your ability to cause things to happen in the world, to make real changes, Inventing new options to choose from, supporting your Teams to do the same.

      All of this is copyleft, open code Thoughtware,

      yours to deliver to as many others as you can.

    • NOTE ABOUT THE POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT 'INFINITY RING'

      Due to our upbringing in modern culture's Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware it is easy to assume that, since the above diagram shows the PM Infinity Ring as the innermost ring, it must be at the top of an imagined hierarchy. This, however, is false. Possibility Management uses Torus Technology in which there is no hierarchy, not even a hidden hierarchy.

      The 'Infinity Ring' is the Node of Possibility Trainers who handle behind-the-curtains (and for-free) whatever needs to be handled to make the Possibility Management gameworld fly. The Infinity Ring is the outer and most available ring in the PM gameworld.

      In many ways, we are the janitors (the 'Sweepers' in Terry Pratchett's book Thief of Time). The doors are open for any active Possibility Trainers to take Radical Responsibility in the Possibility Management Context to make Proposals to this gameworld-building decision-making Node.

      If that is you, please contact us directly.

      THIS WEBSITE

      This website maps the Possibility Management gameworld and gives you links for learning how to participate in opportunities that Possibility Management provides.

      Possibility Management is the gameworld where 'next culture' Edgeworkers take Radical Responsibility for helping each other heal and grow-up into Authentic Adulthood.

      From there we help each other jack-in to inner and outer Resources that modern culture knows nothing about, and collaboratively create Initiation-centered Archan cultures on Earth... the cultures naturally emerging now that Matriarchy and Patriarchy have run their course.

      Possibility Management is a global co-creation community empowering each other using Torus Technology to deliver your real gifts, and the services of your true calling.

      SYSTEMIC CONSTELLATION: POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT, JANUARY 2025

      During the Cavitation Bridgehouse, where 12 Possibility Management Trainers and Trainers-in-training lived together for 6 weeks, we were called to source a Systemic Constellation for the gameworld of Possibility Management.

      The question at the center of the constellation is: What needs to happen within Possibility Management for this gameworld to create better results?

      The Constellation is 1h20m long. It is painful in many ways, and it seems, an accurate history of the last few years of the shift that have occurred in the gameworld of Possibility Management.

      We are glad that we can make this internal work visible.

    • Possibility Management Gameworld Elements

      Over the years we have discovered and built out so many new elements of Possibility Management.

      POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT'S GLOBAL CALENDARS

      possibilitymanagement.org/calendar

      The online home of the global Possibility Management Calendar of Events: providing thoughtware-upgrade Expand The Box Trainings, Possibility Labs, and other authentic adulthood healing and initiatory processes for next culture - Archiarchy.

       

      We also invite you to check out the Possibility Management Global Online Offers | Teamup Calendar at: https://teamup.com/ksv2xq34sxiagcuei1

       

      and, our Possibility Management Global Telegram Group at:

      https://t.me/+8fJY9XlnYdkwNTRi

       

      There is a lot of amazing stuff being created and discovered!

      NEXT CULTURE RADIO

      nextcultureradio.org

      The Possibility Management platform for audio recordings of WorkTalks, Workshops, seminars, and interviews, including remarkable archival recordings from the origins of Possibility Management.

      S.T.A.R.R.s

      Startling Tales About Radical Responsibility

      starrs.mystrikingly.com

      Short video investigations into Distinctions and Practices with Radical Responsibility made by Edgeworkers and Possibilitators at the front lines of evolution.

      DISTINCTIONARY OF POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT TERMS

      distinctionary.mystrikingly.com

      The online dictionary of hundreds of Possibility Management Distinctions, with links to related websites in the StartOver.xyz game environment.

      STARTOVER.XYZ

      startoverxyz.mystrikingly.com

      StartOver.xyz is a free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline matrix-building thoughtware-upgrade personal-transformation true-life adventure-game.

      Your first entrance door is at How To Play.

       

      Your second entrance door could be grazing at the Spaceport - an alphabetical listing of all the 500+ interlinked StartOver.xyz websites.

       

      Please register the Matrix Points you earn from doing the thousands of Matrix-Building Box-Expanding StartOver.xyz Experiments in your free account here: https://login.startover.xyz.

       

      We invite you into the astonishing experience of bringing the Tools, Distinctions, Thoughtmaps, and Processes of Possibility Management into your daily life.

      POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT TV

      youtube.com/possibilitymanagementtv

      Here we offer Possibility Management's complete collection of videos from worktalks, workshops, trainings, interviews, meetings, etc.

       

      The PM TV Channel also includes legendary recordings from the beginnings of Possibility Management.

      S.P.A.R.K.s

      Specific Practical Applications of Radical Knowledge

      sparks-english.mystrikingly.com

      There are over 200 S.P.A.R.K.s in English, with many being translated into other languages including Czech, German, Portuguese, Russian, Italian, Polish, French, Hebrew, Finnish, Swedish, Romanian, Farsi, Vietnamese, and Arabic.

      S.P.A.R.K.s are available online at https://sparks.nextculture.org/en, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days per year, for you to download and empower your daily life with matrix-building Experiments. S.P.A.R.K. Experiments are fabulous for your Possibility Team.

      S.P.A.R.K. Podcasts in English

      sparkpodcasts-en.mystrikingly.com

      There are over 260 S.P.A.R.K.s in English. A Team is starting to make English S.P.A.R.K. Podcasts for your listening pleasure. (NOTE: Be expecially careful if you are listening to a S.P.A.R.K. Podcast while driving a car. When feelings arise, please pull over to the side of the road and experience your feelings there before continuing to drive. Thank you.)

      S.P.A.R.K. PDFs are available online at sparks.nextculture.org/en, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days per year, for you to download and use for empowering your daily life with matrix-building Experiments.

      S.P.A.R.K. Podcasts in German

      sparkpodcasts-de.mystrikingly.com

      There are over 200 S.P.A.R.K.s in German. A Team is starting to make German S.P.A.R.K. Podcasts for your listening pleasure. (NOTE: Be expecially careful if you are listening to a S.P.A.R.K. Podcast while driving a car. When feelings arise, please pull over to the side of the road and experience your feelings there before continuing to drive. Thank you.)

      S.P.A.R.K. PDFs are available online at sparks.nextculture.org/de, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days per year, for you to download and use for empowering your daily life with matrix-building Experiments.

      S.P.A.R.K. Podcasts in Portuguese

      sparkpodcasts-pt.mystrikingly.com

      There are over 260 S.P.A.R.K.s in Portuguese. A Team is starting to make Portuguese Podcasts for your listening pleasure. (NOTE: Be expecially careful if you are listening to a S.P.A.R.K. Podcast while driving a car. When feelings arise, please pull over to the side of the road and experience your feelings there before continuing to drive. Thank you.)

      S.P.A.R.K. PDFs are available online at sparks.nextculture.org/pt, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days per year, for you to download and use for empowering your daily life with matrix-building Experiments.

      HEART GYM

      heartgym.mystrikingly.com

      Heart Gym is an online or in-person research and practice space to connect with your Emotional Body, come into Experiential Reality, and practice your Basic Inner Navigation Skills (BINS), while honing your ability to Hold Space and create Intimacy.

      Here you meet fellow Edgeworkers from around the world, all helping each other to get Grounded, Centered, and Present in a life that includes experiencing and communicating from the heart. This is so exciting it can hardly be put into worlds. Almost everything that is missing comes to life in full color and texture when your heart wakes up. Come do the Experiments with us!

      POSSIBILITY MANAGERS

      possibilitymanagers.mystrikingly.com

      Here you find a catalog of offerings from Possibility Managers, Possibilitators, and Possibility Trainers around the world.

      These showcase websites are sorted into Project Websites, PM Country Websites, and Possibility Manager Personal Websites.

      What a beautiful bounty of co-intelligent creation! Here are dozens of Doorways through which you can find out what the other Possibilitators around the world are creating. Plus, each link is an invitation to connect and collaborate on projects!

      POSSIBILITATOR TRAINING

      possibilitatortraining.mystrikingly.com

      The Possibilitator Path is rich with challenges, deep dives into yourself, authentic connections with highly motivated Team players, learning so many things you never knew you did not know about.

       

      You will be Upgrading Human Thoughtware starting with your own, delivering Processes for others both on this Path and in life, and building Bridges to Archiarchy - 'next culture' - by bringing to life your own Gaian Gameworlds and delivering your own Nonmaterial Value.

      RAGE CLUB

      rageclub.org

      The purpose of Rage Club is to change your relationship to the feeling of anger so that anger is consciously available to you as an adult whenever you need it, without being possessed or overwhelmed by it.

       

      In modern culture we are deeply conditioned to believe that it is not okay to be angry because “anger is one of the negative feelings,” and “anger is dangerous, loud, embarrassing, uncivilized”. When you learn to own your anger and use it responsibly, you get clarity and can act, protect yourself and avoid creating victim-drama-stories.

       

      Rage Clubs are an extremely safe learning environment allowing you to reconnect to the adult and archetypal power and intelligence of your anger.

      RAGE CLUB SPACEHOLDER TRAINING

      rageclubspaceholdertraining.mystrikingly.com

      Rage Club Spaceholders are delivering online and offline Rage Clubs around the world. Can you imaging any work more important than this, people taking their Center back, their Voice Back, their Authority Back, their creation power back!

       

      So much healing and transformation happens in Rage Club. Each meeting is a celebratory event!

       

      See if you can get into the next Rage Club Spaceholder Training.

      FEAR CLUB

      fearclub.mystrikingly.com

      So often people are angry because they are afraid.

       

      On the other hand, so often people are numb and withholding themselves from connection and creation because they are afraid.

       

      But what are you actually afraid of?

       

      And why does fear own your life?

       

      On the New Thoughtmap of Feelings, fear changes from being something to avoid into something to welcome.

       

      "Hello Fear! What do you have for me?"

       

      Then write it down in your Beep! Book.

       

      Then go do the Fear-Informed Experiments that change your life!

       

      Welcome to Fear Club! Online or offline. Nothing is scarier.

      FEAR CLUB SPACEHOLDER TRAINING

      fearclubspaceholdertraining.mystrikingly.com

      After being in Fear Club for a while you cannot help but wish the deep healing gifts for others.

       

      Well, the others won't have them until you muster your own evolutionary spaceholding talents to create and hold Fear Club to give those gifts away.

       

      In the past decade, rage has become 'all the rage'. People are recognizing and starting to use the value of Conscious Anger in their lives.

       

      Now it is time for Conscious Fear.

       

      Will you become part of the Fear Club Spaceholder Team?

      EHP DOJO (EMOTIONAL HEALING PROCESSES)

      ehpdojo.mystrikingly.com

      EHP stands for 'Emotional Healing Process'.

      A 'Dojo' can be defined as a 'formal training temple for immersive learning'.

      In Japanese, the term 'dōjō' literally means: 'place of the Way'.

      In this case, the phrase, 'the Way', refers to 'a Path of authentic Adulthood Initiatory and Healing Processes contexted in Archiarchy'.

      An entire website is dedicated to sharing what we have learned and developed so far

      about Emotional Healing Processes (EHP). That website is: http://process.mystrikingly.com

      Emotional Healing Processes are one of the services provided by Possibility Coaches, Possibility Mediators, Possibility Psychologists, Memetic Engineers, Possibility Trainers, and other next culture professionals.

      In addition, EHPs are often the core success factor in authentic adulthood initiations, and a key element in physical and mental healing.

      Over 100 actual Emotional Healing Processes have been recorded and are available for viewing at: http://createpossibility.mystrikingly.com/#100-videos

      POSSIBILITY TEAMS

      possibilityteam.mystrikingly.com

      Participants often say that the Possibility Labs are amazing and necessary, but where their life really changed was in their Possibility Team, a weekly meeting in someone's living room to practice applying new skills in an ultra-safe environment.

       

      One tiny step after another, supported by fellow adventurers, builds your capacity to show up in your life like nothing else can. If you cannot locate a Possibility Team near you on the PM Calendar, simply start one of your own.

       

      You can download your free PossibiIity Team Handbook with all the details from the Possibility Team website.

      GREMLIN TRANSFORMATION

      gremlintransformation.mystrikingly.com

      Gremlin Transformation is an online or offline 8 to 12 week space for transforming your relationship with your Gremlin, and by association, with Gremlins in general.

      Gremlin Transformation is an important prerequisite to Adult Egostate Decontamination.

      Gremlin Transformation includes significant Gremlin healing and clarification processes, such as:

      • Gremlin Hunting
      • Gremlin Journals
      • Distinguishing Type 1 and Type 2 Gremlins
      • Gremlin Reconstruction
      • Becoming a Trigger Hunter
      • The Hidden Purpose of your relationship may be to feed your Gremlin.
      • Being 'nice' or 'a good person' is Gremlin food.
      • Gremlin Violence
      • Gremlin Self Cannibalism

      Further Gremlin Experiments are available in S.P.A.R.K.s by visiting http://sparks.nextculture.org/en and searching on the term 'gremlin'.

      GREMLIN TRANSFORMER TRAINING

      gremlintransformertraining.mystrikingly.com

      It could be part of your Path to help others transform their Gremlin into an ally for healing and transformation.

       

      Here are those who developed Gremlin Transformation, supporting you to deliver such valuable work in the world yourself.

      ADULT EGOSTATE DECONTAMINATION

      decontamination.mystrikingly.com

      If you have Contaminated your Adult Egostate with Child, Parent, Gremlin, or Demon Egostates, it can now be Decontaminated.

      Far weightier than we ever before imagined, contaminating your Adult Egostate with behaviors from your Child Egostate, Parent Egostate, Gremlin Egostate, or Demon Egostate as a Survival Strategy has serious consequences. It is straightforward how to Decontaminate your Adult Egostate.

      No one can do this for you.

      More interestingly, no one can stop you from doing it.

      ADULT EGOSTATE DECONTAMINATOR TRAINING

      decontaminatortraining.mystrikingly.com

      By Decontaminating your own Adult Egostate, you directly experience the incredible Value of this work.

       

      If it is your job to pass on this Value through serving as a Decontaminator for others as your next-culture service to the village, you will be greatly supported through Decontaminator Training.

      GAMEWORLD INCUBATOR

      gameworldincubator.mystrikingly.com

      If you are not finding satisfaction living inside of the capitalist patriarchal empire, then you are already an Edgeworker. After some time living at the edge, it starts to become apparent that you have a further step to take: build your own Gameworld. As Buckminster Fuller implied, "You don't change things by fighting against the existing gameworlds. You change things by building and inhabiting new regenerative gameworlds that make the existing gameworlds irrelevant."

      Gameworld Incubator is a Team that helps each other apply Gameworld building tools from:

      • Gameworld Builder
      • Gameworld Consulting
      • Gameworld Theory
      • Gaian Gameworlds

      Either you consciously design each gameworld you live in or you are a pawn in someone else’s gameworld. Don't be left behind playing in a stupid gameworld.

      BRIDGE-HOUSE

      bridgehouse.mystrikingly.com

      A Bridge-House is a next-culture village-skills training environment.

      You carry a piece of the puzzle for how to create and inhabit regenerative human cultures on Earth.

       

      One purpose of Bridge-House is to clarify, amplify, and launch your piece of the puzzle.

      Another purpose of Bridge-House is to empower each other to be Spaceholders for more Bridge-Houses.

       

      In other words, Bridge-House empowers Gaian Gameworld Builders who eventually may create Gaiavillages or Archiarchally contexted Nanonations.

      EXPAND THE BOX TRAININGS

      expandthebox.mystrikingly.com

      Expand The Box is a 3-5 day life-changing experience that provides a safe environment for big steps along your growing path.

       

      To gradually leave behind illusions, beliefs, dependencies, and patterns put onto you by others, and to unfold your own life’s rich possibilities!

       

      So much happens when you upgrade from Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware!

      POSSIBILITY LABS

      possibilitylabs.mystrikingly.com

      Possibility Labs deliver profound healing and activation experiences that ignite your talents for co- creating next-culture life.

      Authentic initiatory processes awaken your unique shift-agent skills for effectively supporting others in their own unfolding.

      POSSIBILITY COACHING

      possibilitycoaching.mystrikingly.com

      Being a Possibility Coach is one of the Possibilitator Training Specialties.

      Possibility Coaches deliver Emotional Healing Processes (EHP) and much, much, more!

      Powerful, personal, private, one-on-one transformational coaching sessions, as seen in the film LEAP: the coaching movie.

      LEAP Film Website: coachingmovie.com

      LEAP Trailer: www.youtube.com/watch?v=NbYV2w-O1Zs

      You can watch for free over 100 actual Possibility Coaching sessions online at http://createpossibility.mystrikingly.com.

      How does a Possibility Coach know what to say?

      How do you stay Unhookable?

      How can you go nonlinear to access the unexpected Doorways during the EHP?

      How can you keep Gremlin from taking over without having to crush or attack Gremlin?

      How can you implement 3 Phase Healing?

      How do you heal Brain Splits, or Mind Machines?

      How do you remove Energetic Blocks?

      How do you navigate the reversal of old decisions made in past lives but still influencing life today?

      How do you recover split-off pieces of the Being?

      How do you invent new procedures that have never been done before?

      Learn these skills, and much more, at Possibility Coaching Training, while you connect in with the global community of Possibility Coaches.

      CREATE POSSIBILITY

      createpossibility.mystrikingly.com

      Here you will find essential clarity about what Possibility is, how to create it, and how to use it for the benefit of yourself and others.

       

      In addition this website offers you over 100 demonstration videos of actual Possibility Coaching sessions, one of the primary ways for sharing Possibility with others.

       

      By watching all 100 demonstration videos, you discover how similar human beings are, plus you gain a chance to participate in each of the healing and transformation journeys.

      FEELINGS PRACTITIONERS

      feelingspractitioner.com

      Being a Feelings Practitioner is one of the Possibilitator Training Specialties.

      A Feelings Practitioner uses feelings and emotions as healing gateways for the physical body.

      Breakthrough discoveries are happening here. This team is revolutionizing 21st Century healing arts.

      Perhaps this is your new vocation!

      POSSIBILITY MEDIATION

      possibilitymediation.mystrikingly.com

      Mediation is a means of resolving disputes outside of the judicial system by voluntary participation in negotiations, structured by agreement of the parties, and conducted under the guidance and supervision of a trained intermediary, the mediator. (Definition from: Merriam-Webster dictionary)

       

      Possibility Mediation takes a different approach. Rather than remaining in the limited assumptions of the current problem space, a Possibility Mediator takes all stakeholders and the current circumstances into a space originating within a different context. The context of Possibility Mediation is radical responsibility and nonlinear possibility. This can change everything.

       

      Being a Possibility Mediator is one of the Possibilitator Training Specialties.

      POSSIBILITY PSYCHOLOGY

      possibilitypsychology.mystrikingly.com

      Being a Possibility Psychologist is one of the Possibilitator Training Specialties.

      Possibility Psychology ('Psychology of Possibility') opens doors to understanding and facilitating evolution in the human psyche.

       

      We know transformation is possible through direct experience, but how does it work? How is evolution enhanced?

       

      Human beings have direct access to archetypal domains in our daily lives. How do we get initiated? How do we navigate and make use of such spaces?

       

      Incorporating transformation into our understanding of human potential is the purpose of the field of Possibility Psychology.

      TRAINER PATH

      trainerpath.mystrikingly.com

      Being a Possibility Trainer is one of the Possibilitator Training Specialties.

       

      A Possibility Management Trainer does not 'have' anything to stand on or hide behind. The PM Trainer does not 'know' anything to teach or defend.

       

      A PM Trainer is a Space of Possibility for facilitating personal and organizational evolution while serving something greater than themselves, namely, the Bright Principles of Love, Possibility, and Evolution, plus their own unique Archetypal Lineage.

      TORUS TECHNOLOGY

      torustechnology.mystrikingly.com

      Modern culture's governments and organizations are built using a pyramidal power structure... a hierarchy.

      A hierarchy promotes those who are best at doing 'whatever it takes' to occupy the next higher position of power. The results are obvious in modern culture - uninitiated psychopaths at the top.

      Unless you learn the entirely new Torus Meeting Technologies, values, decision-making procedures, and processes needed to create and run meetings in circles (toroids...) you will merely re-create modern culture in 'green'.

      WOMEN OF EARTH

      womenofearth.live

      Women carry seeds of regenerative cultures.

      The Women of Earth take powerful evolutionary actions that source cultures contexted in Radical Responsibility, Nonmaterial Value, and Authentic, Adulthood Initiatory Processes.

      Patriarchal Thoughtware has ruled men's (and women's) minds for 10,000 years. The next culture is arising. Are you ready to activate your life?

      THOUGHTWARE PRESS

      thoughtwarepress.org

      Thoughtware Press is an association of authors writing together in the context of Radical Responsibility, Radical Reliance, Radical Simplicity, Radical Relating, and Radical Reality. We offer you transformational handbooks, novels, articles, and film scripts as bridges to next culture: Archiarchy, the culture naturally emerging around the world now that Matriarchy and Patriarchy have run their course.

      These works empower you to build and empower your Nonmaterial Value as an Authentically Initiated Free And Natural Adult.

      The sudden impact of reading Thoughtware Press publications comes from 'Memetic Writing', that is, a specific style of writing that upgrades your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) by landing powerful new distinctions in your Being.

      WARNING: You will not work with these books - these books work with you. Our books are filled with memetic viruses - ideas that swarm through every level of your thinking to replace any ideas that are formulated with less Clarity than they are. We refer to this experience as 'High Level Fun!'

    • Infrequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

      These questions are frequently asked, but perhaps not frequently enough...

      WHERE DID POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT COME FROM?
      Long ago, in a country far, far away, a young Physics student named Clinton Callahan realized he was not learning what he truly longed to learn through California Polytechnic State University's 1975 curriculum. He eventually became frustrated enough to post flyers for a meeting to discuss...
      Read more...
      WHAT IS POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT?
      Possibility Management encompasses a spectrum of innovative soft skills which allow you to liberate often-overlooked inner and outer Resources. To these tools we combine core elements from other important teachings, such as Transactional Analysis, originated by Eric Berne, and Parent...
      Read more...
      WHERE CAN I FIND BOOKS ABOUT THE THE IDEAS OF POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT?
      Thoughtware from Possibility Management is published in a number of powerful books: Conscious Feelings in its Hohm Press edition was sold out, revised, and significantly updated in 2022 by Clinton Callahan and is now available through Thoughtware Press. Conscious Feelings is already translated...
      Read more...
      WHY ARE TWO LOGOS ASSOCIATED WITH POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT?
      One logo shows the cube and the sphere symbols from Possibility Management, where the cube represents current reality and the sphere represents unlimited Possibilities. The connection between the cube and the sphere symbolizes the ever-present Possibility of Transformation - the mythical ...
      Read more...
      WHAT IS THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN EDUCATION AND TRAINING?
      An Education provides already known information for you to think about in classes. A Training upgrades the thoughtware you are using to think with in processes. An Education adds content to your mind. A Training shifts the context of your Being. In classes you learn something new through...
      Read more...
      HOW DOES POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT DELIVER ARCHETYPAL INITIATIONS?
      One way to understand archetypal initiations is to regard each person as inhabiting 5 Bodies... physical, intellectual, emotional, energetic, and archetypal. The first four bodies are rather straightforward to make sense of. For example: The physical body has organs with sensations like smell,...
      Read more...
      IS POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT BUILDING AN ARMY?
      QUESTIONER: Long story short: I am getting flashes of how PM is building an army. The strongest perception of it was during the Gaia Villages introductory call, when suddenly I had this vision of armies rising with a lot of force and power. Since then, I find evidence that tries to convince me...
      Read more...
      IS POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT A SECT?
      A man from Australia makes an intelligent, independent analysis of the gameworld of Possibility Management based on his own personal experience. His name is Michael Cann, and his article is copy-pasted below. He says, "Is Possibility Management a cult? I'm glad you asked..." Through this...
      Read more...
      WHAT ARE THE COSTS?
      What are the costs for Possibility Coaching, Rage Club, Fear Club, WorkTalks, Workshops, Expand The Box Trainings, Possibility Labs, Specialty Labs, and Possibilitator Training? In the global transformational gameworld of Possibility Management it is our tradition to maintain a consistent...
      Read more...
      HOW CAN I CREATE A BRIDGE-HOUSE IN MY AREA?
      ...with a very clear answer. Please find a complete support program for creating a Bridge-House in your area at this dedicated website: bridge-house.mystrikingly.com Please let us know what we can do to support you.  
      Read more...
      HOW CAN I CREATE AN ARCHIARCHY INVENTION CENTER IN MY AREA?
      ...with a very clear answer. Please find a complete support program for creating an Archiarchy Invention Center in your area at this dedicated website: archiarchyinventioncenters.mystrikingly.com Please let us know what we can do to support you.  
      Read more...
      HOW CAN I CREATE AN EXPAND THE BOX TRAINING IN MY AREA?
      ...with a very clear answer. Please find a complete support program for creating an Expand The Box training in your area at this dedicated website: createanexpandthebox.mystrikingly.com Please let us know what we can do to support you.

    • Possibility Management Gameworld Codex

      ...every gameworld begins with a Codex

      For more than 45 years the originators of Possibility Management have passionately shared open-code tools and distinctions that bring people into greater responsibility. Today a world-wide network of trainers is collaborating to create a shared vision of a global shift into next culture... Archiarchy...

      Possibility Management Gameworld Codex

      (click above to download the PDF file)

      And... every gameword flies according to the skill of is Guardian Pilots! Here is an example of Very Luísa Franco deepening the context in our Telegram Possibility Creation Village:

      CLARIFYING THE CONTEXT OF THE GLOBAL POSSIBILITY VILLAGE TELEGRAM GROUP

      by Vera Luisa Franco, [11-Aug-25 18:16]

      Dear Village,

      I have changed the name of this group from 'Archiarchy Creation Village' back to 'Possibility Creation Village'.

      The change comes from the clarity of what I hold space for as a Guardian, Village Weaver, Gameworld Builder and Evolutionary Spaceholder contexted in Radical Responsibility, and from the clarity of the difference between Possibility Management and Archiarchy.

      'Archiarchy' is the name we give to the culture that comes after Matriarchy and Patriarchy have run their course. Matriarchy was when humans were mostly hunter-gatherers (and the Mother was Gaia), and Patriarchy was when humans started to ‘own’ land, grow food privately and decided to guard that food privately with the creation of armies, and the creation of a hierarchical structure of rule and legacy from the father - pater - to the son.

      Matriarchy is a baby-culture with very low level responsibility.

      Patriarchy is a child level responsibility culture (or teenage at best).

      Archiarchy starts at Adult-Level Responsibility and currently includes High-level and also Radical-Level Responsibility. This means there are many different contexts working to create Archiarchy, with different levels of effectiveness.

      Possibility Management is not Archiarchy.

      Possibility Management is a Gameworld that dedicates itself to the discovery and practical application of a very particular kind of upgraded Thoughtware. The particular Thoughtware that Possibility Management discovers, unfolds, and upgrades in human consciousness comes from the context (meaning practical application) of Radical Responsibility. Radically responsible Thoughtware is particularly and absurdly effective in naturally creating Archiarchy.

      This last paragraph tells you that the Thoughtware coming from a Radical-Level of Responsibility is different than Thoughtware coming from High Level Responsibility, or from Adult Level Responsibility, even if they all help with different levels of effectiveness and scale, to create Archiarchy. These other contexts may establish a field of resonance to create Archiarchy. Therefore it can be possible for collaboration to exist between people and gameworlds of Adult, High, and Radical-Level Responsibility when the purpose is resonant, such as creating and unfolding Archiarchy.

      This Telegram group - now called Possibility Creation Village - is a Possibility Management Village. It does NOT have the purpose of creating an Archiarchy Village that contains and practices a combination or mixture of Adult, High, and Radical-Level Responsibility. This Telegram grpoup does NOT have the purpose for everything that is Archiarchy to be shared and celebrated here.

      The Possibility Creation Village is a group with the purpose of practicing living at a Radical-Level of Responsibility to create High Drama and effectively unfold Archiarchy at a radical level of empowerment. This means that if you enter and participate in this Village, a part of you is asking for this level of practice, and this is the part of you that we commit to empower. This means in practice that by entering this playing field you are agreeing to play at this level.

      We have been discovering a few traits that naturally emerge from authentically playing at the Radical Level of Responsibility. For example, playing at this level naturally creates Spaceholders for Radically Responsible Thoughtware upgrades. It is part of the natural traditions that emerge from living in that context to upgrade and question and confront each other systemically about each other’s Thoughtware. We discovered that authentically playing at the Radical Level of Responsibility creates a legacy of abundance of Empowerment and Winning Happening that goes far beyond the personal and family or live-in community-level benefits. High-Level Responsibility playing does not create so much at this scale. We discovered that authentically playing at the Radical Level of Responsibility creates Radical Responsibility Space Cavitators and Context Holders and Context Guardians, instead of creating Hierarchy and knowledge for a few. In Radical Responsibility, Villagers are not content with other villagers being complacent with where they are. They demand more of their playing mates.

      This Village is not for children or Child-Level Reponsibility context because in this Village you most likely will be confronted with your own Thoughtware, with your Upperworld and Underworld, with the Purposen of upgrading your thoughtware in order to practice living in a Radical Responsibility context.

      A Village contexted in Radical Responsibility is very generous and empowering of anyone who wants to upgrade their thoughtware, even if they will never want to live a life of Radically Responsible practice. Therefore we do not kick people out who want to learn and grow. If you do not want to live a life contexted in a radical relationship to Responsibility, you are still welcome here - the same way you do not have to be a professional football player to play football every now and then. It just means you are entering a football playing field where trying to play basketball will not work. (If you want to play basketball please go create that playing field with other basketball players. There are many people who want that).

      You may learn from what is being shared, you may ask questions and possibilities, share legends, create teams and new gameworlds, share discoveries of what works and does not work. And as we are playing at a particular level of Practice, this might mean that some of your offers will not be valid to play. I invite you to take a conscious risk, and learn from Beep!s and Go!s.

      You may even want to relate to this village at a zero, child, adult or high-level of responsibility. Those choices will most likely be used as an opportunity to deepen and clarify the context of Radical Responsibility for everyone, so that in true Radical Responsibility tradition, we all learn with the Beep!s, and we all learn with the Go!s.

      So for now the main distinctions are:

      - Possibility Management is not Archiarchy. Archiarchy makes use of thoughtware from Possibility Management.

      - This is a Possibility Management Village (which is a particular kind of Archiarchy Village).

      - This Village is created for the purpose of practicing life in a radical relationship to responsibility. This is the field we are playing in.

      - Playing at the radical level of responsibility has particular and practical consequences in life.

      - You are welcome to learn to play and practice with us playing at this Radical-Level of Resposibility.

      Sometimes I hear people say that Possibility Management includes different contexts because it uses maps or distinctions from Transactional Analysis, such as the Drama Triangle, or from other Gameworlds. This is not true, and I want to clarify this.

      What happens is that sometimes, for example, a map or a distinction from Adult Level Responsibility is found and then adopted into Possibility Management through refining the thoughtmap to the radical application of responsibility. After this process, the thoughtmap is completely different, has new distinctions added that apply differently and create different results, even if the thoughtmap retains some of the original terminology of the old thoughtmap.

      For example, the Karpman Drama Triangle map (which is at best contexted in adult level responsibility, and often applied in child level responsibility), is a completely different map than of the Map of Low Drama with distinctions that do not exist or are applied in Transactional Analysis.

      Yoga is not contexted in Radical Responsibility. Authentic Relating is not contexted in Radical Responsibility. Tantra is not contexted in Radical Responsibility. The Work That Reconnects is not contexted in Radical Responsibility. ISTA is not contexted in Radical Responsibility. That does not mean these gameworlds do not have power, or are not useful or healing. If Yoga went through the Radically Responsible process, meaning each distinction would be carefully passed through the Radically Responsible Thoughtware Upgrade Processes, it would not be Yoga. It would be something else. Something new. The same for other gameoworlds.

      Radical Responsibility is not the best Level of Responsibility (better/worse, good/bad, superior/inferior, right/wrong is Child Level Responsibility Thoughtware). Radical Responsibility is simply the Clarity that you are responsible for the level of responsibility that is being taken wherever you are. It is the Clarity that everything is as it is because you create it that way, regardless of what or how you feel or think about that. That fact this village - or your village, or your relating space, or the world, or the culture you interact in - is the way it is, is because you make it so.

      From this unreasonable, archetypal, and practical Clarity, comes a domain of potent radically empowering thoughtware and Transformational Processes that have the power to put you in the High Drama Creator position wherever you are, in whatever circumstances you are experiencing. Being contexted in Radical Responsibility means you love to practice day-by-day, moment-by-moment, applying the Possibility Management Distinctions and being in the discovery of new ones, while deepening the very context you are using. It does not mean having to be perfectly responsible ('perfection' is a Fantasy World from Patriarchy), or to pressure oneself to become a 'good possibilitator' (another Patriarchy trap applied to Possibility Management).

      Being contexted in Radical Responsibility also does not mean that you apply some Possibility Management distinctions some of the time, and some not, regardless of the reasons you have for this. (“The reason is not the cause,” is meme of Radical Responsibility.)

      Being contexted in Radical Responsibility means that you stay in an infinite game of growth and evolution, a game that never ends, and that you work for forces of evolution instead of against them. High Level Responsibility contexts tend to have plateaus or the thoughtware that you have finally reached a kind of state of health, growth, healing, empowerment, clarity, creation power, and that 'means' something.

      For people contexted in Radical Responsibility, that last sentence does not make sense.

      Having your space contexted in Radical Responsibility also does not mean you use some Possibility Management distinctions, and not others. In fact I see people using Radical Responsibility distinctions at a child level responsibility (the Patriarchal pacman strategy that Anne-Chloé talks about). This is more like being a 'friend of PM'. Hello PM friends all over the world!

      Being a Possibilitator, meaning, contexting your Spaces in Radical Responsibility, means that you love to engage in ongoing, unpredictable, uncontrollable Liquid States where you apply the Possibility Management Distinctions to the best of your abilities, and that your ‘best’ keeps evolving, in a Team that is contexted in Radical Responsible enough to give you ongoing Radically Responsible Feedback and Coaching.

    • StartOver.xyz

      NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play, massively-multiplayer, online-and-offline, thoughtware-upgrade, matrix-building, personal-transformation, adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code POSMGMNT.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

      Cookie Use
      We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By accepting, you agree the use of cookies. Learn More

      ×
      What Are Cookies?

      Cookies are bits of information (memory files) stored in your browser by sites you visit. As is common practice with almost all websites, this site uses cookie to improve your experience by remembering your preferences and enable other cookie-based features (e.g. analytics).

      Our Cookies

      When you submit data through a form such as those found on contact pages or comment forms, cookies may be set to remember your user details for future correspondence.

      In order to provide you with a better experience and remember your preferences, we need to set cookies so that this information can be called whenever you interact with a page.

      Third-Party cookies

      In special cases, we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties like Google Analytics. Third party analytics are used to track and measure usage of this site so that we can continue to produce engaging content.

      How To Disable Cookies?

      Most browsers let you to refuse to accept cookies. See your browser Help or Tool for how to do this. Be aware that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this and many other websites you visit. Therefore, it is recommended that you do not disable cookies.

      Cookie Use
      We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By continuing we assume you accept the use of cookies.
